caption: A man is seated in a podcast studio, wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT MAN", a black baseball cap with gold embroidery, gold chains, and large over-ear headphones. He sits before a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background features a wall with repeating text that includes "HUSTLE" and gold stars, and a screen displaying "TALK 101". On-screen graphics include a logo reading "PODCAST" and text that says "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man is engaged in conversation. He begins by gesturing with his right hand while speaking. He then raises both hands to adjust his headphones and cap. After a brief pause, he continues to adjust his headwear before finally gesturing with his right hand again while looking toward someone off-screen.
